detail_text: Dr Gram Organic Coconut Palm Sugar offers a healthier and more nutritious alternative to high fructose sweeteners and processed cane sugars. It is naturally low on the glycemic index (G.I about 35). This means that it doesn't raise your blood sugar as quickly as refined sugars do. Unlike refined sugars, Dr Gram Organic Coconut sugar retains trace amounts of Vitamins (B & C) and minerals (potassium, phosphorus, magnesium, zinc, etc) even after it is processed. Having a sweet aroma and a hint of caramel flavour that offers a unique variation from refined sugars makes it easy for you to switch to organic coconut sugar! Dr Gram Organic Coconut Sugar makes an excellent 1:1 ratio replacement to refined white sugar spoon-for-spoon and cup-for-cup. There's also only 15 calories per serving! title: Sugar Icing Redman 20Kg
detail_text: Icing sugar can be used for a range of decorations for desserts like cakes and cookies, and also creating sweets like candy and fudge. Use it to dust fruit or fruit tarts to elevate its presentation, add colours to the icing to bring your imagination to life, or add ingredients to create delicious variations of frosting. . Designed and produced in Singapore, our Redman Icing Sugar is a perfect blend of corn starch and finely-ground sugar. It is also commonly known as confectioner's sugar, powdered sugar or even 10X sugar. Our icing sugar is halal-certified and is available in packets of 500g, 1kg, cartons of 20 packets of 1kg and 20kg. How to use Use as a topping with desserts like brownies, or use to create delectable creations like chocolate lava cakes, Christmas sugar cookies or melt-in-your-mouth butter cookies. Mix with cream cheese and lemon zest for a tangy, creamy frosting, or butter for beloved old school buttercream frosting... Suggested Recipes Snow Powder or Non-Melting Strawberry Powered Sugar can be used as alternatives... Ingredient Allergen

detail_text: Singapore-based Phoon Huat Pte Ltd, founded in 1947, has grown into one of Singapore’s leading food suppliers. Specialising in manufacturing and supply of quality baking ingredients, tools and services for food services, consumer retail, artisan, and industrial bakeries. Leveraging on a global network of partners, Phoon Huat brings in quality and best value ingredients from all corners of the globe. We offer one-stop consolidation services and provide solutions using new food concept innovations and have expanded our product range to include premium meats, seafood and gourmet fine foods. title: SHIYUEDAOTIAN | Tea and Baking Special Grade Yellow Rock Sugar 1kg
detail_text: Premium Quality Made from premium sugarcane, this 1kg pack of October Rice Field Yellow Rock Sugar offers superior taste and quality for your baking needs. Versatile Use Perfect for brewing tea or baking, these rock sugars are versatile and can be used in various culinary applications to enhance the flavor of your dishes. Authentic Flavor Hailing from Yunnan province, these rock sugars retain their authentic flavor, providing a natural sweetness to your beverages and desserts. High Quantity With a generous 1kg pack, you'll have plenty of rock sugars to last through multiple baking sessions or tea sessions. Convenient Packaging Packaged in airtight cans, these rock sugars maintain their freshness and prevent moisture absorption, ensuring a long shelf life.
